response.step_by_step_log: The video features Kureiji Ollie singing 'Monitoring' by DECO*27. The song title was confirmed via the #KoishiteruZOMBIE hashtag and on-screen credit 'Lyrics, Music: DECO*27'. Lyrics were found by searching for '"モニタリング" DECO*27 Japanese and English lyrics'. The song occupies the first part of the video, followed by a speaking section for birthday announcements.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual live performance by Kureiji Ollie, singing 'Monitoring' by DECO*27, followed by a birthday-themed outro with merchandise announcement.

scenes.description: Kureiji Ollie performs the song 'Monitoring' in a 3D virtual studio. 'Lyrics, Music: DECO*27' is shown on-screen at 00:51.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり
してるの知ってるよ ビクンビクン震えてさ
声もダダ漏れなんだわ 正直に言っちゃえよ
バレてるんだし言っちゃえよ 効いてんの？
普通普通 恥ずかしい みんな隠しているだけ
ねえあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり
してるの知ってるよ ビクンビクン震えてさ
声もダダ漏れなんだわ
しんどいときはいわいくらいでちょうどいい
あたしそれでも好きだよ
何度だって受け止めてあげる
もう我慢しないで出しちゃってね？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I know, I know you're doing it alone, I know it
You're trembling, and your voice is leaking out, too
Just tell me honestly, you're busted, so just say it
Is it working? It's normal, normal, you're just hiding your embarrassment
Everyone is just hiding it
I know, I know you're alone, I know it
I know, I know, I know
Your voice is leaking, it's shaking, it's trembling
It's okay to be like this, and it's okay not to be
I'll accept it all, no matter how many times, I'll accept it
Don't hold back anymore, just let it all out, okay?

scenes.description: Post-performance outro with dialogue from Kureiji Ollie and an announcement for her 2025 birthday merchandise set.
